violations.text: The dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of litter, debris, and vegetation. The dumpster enclosure must be maintained clean to prevent harborage for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

The floors in the basement storage areas have an accumulation of soil residue, dried spilled liquid, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment (such as a milk cooler) or items were observed in the basement storage area. One back room in the basement has an accumulation of unused items and clutter. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024
